import.success: Games are successfully imported from BoardGameGeek
import.failed: Failed importing games from BoardGameGeek, check logs for more details.

start.title: Import games from BoardGameGeek
start.description: Import your game collection from BoardGameGeek. You can select which games you want to import in the next step.

import.intro: We found {{count}} games in your BGG collection, {{collectionCount}} are already included in your local collection. Select what games you want to import. Select max {{maxImport}} games at any time, this is to prevent stress on the bgg website.
import.error-description: Something went wrong while fetching your collection from BoardGameGeek. Please check your API key in settings and try again.
import.hide-collected: Hide games that are in your collection already
